reachability.evidence: Authenticated GET/POST to https://mail.superhuman.com/~backend/v3/* returns 200 with Bearer JWT. No Cloudflare/WAF challenge observed. Probe returned cleanly with logged-in session.

quirks: Content-Type is text/plain;charset=UTF-8 for /v3/userdata.* and /v3/ai.* (NOT JSON despite JSON body)
/v3/userdata.getThreads rejects listId filter (Split-Inbox category filtering requires CDP)
AI question_event_id has a specific format: event_11V<rand4><userPrefix4><rand7> base62
draftId must be draft00 + exactly 14 hex chars
